name: atlas-blob-compute-determinism
description: E5 Phase 7d Step 10 — compute marcher determinism check. Captures the storage texture 5 times and verifies all captures are bitwise-identical. Compute output is deterministic per-pixel (no atomics in outColor writes, only in the dispatchCounters buffer). Failure indicates a regression — race condition, uniform-buffer write race between captures, or non-deterministic per-thread state.
